# fly_ext_vector (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io Vector extension.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_ext_vector" "logs" {
  name = "my-vector"
  app  = fly_app.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The app name. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `name` (String) The name of the extension. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the extension.
- `status` (String) The extension status.
